label: Necropolis (gothic cult)

wall.inset_note: brick-wall depth anchor is off-centre (z-centre -0.35); inset = 0.35*scale(4) = 1.4 pushes it out to straddle the cell edge like a normal wall.

scale_note: graveyard is 1-unit → scale 4. brick-wall (1x0.73x0.3) has thickness but is low (gothic/ruined look). graveyard has NO clean 1x1 floor (road is 0.8), so floor falls back to the flush space template-floor; gothic brick WALLS carry the theme.
notes: NEEDS EDITOR TUNING: wall/corner yaw_offset, scale-4 check. Rich PROP set in-folder for later: gravestones, crypts, mausoleum, pillars, iron fences, lanterns, candles, altars, coffins, dead trees. alt walls: stone-wall, iron-fence (open railing).
